description_long: This is a modern, angular combat tactical vehicle with a low-profile, armored hull and a prominent main cannon mounted on a rotating turret. The vehicle is painted in a solid dark green color, with visible panel lines and geometric shapes that suggest reinforced armor plating. The sides feature six large, rugged road wheels on each side, supporting heavy-duty tracks for all-terrain mobility. The turret is centrally positioned and includes a single, long-barreled cannon, with a small hatch and additional raised structure toward the rear. The front of the vehicle is sharply sloped, enhancing its defensive capabilities, while the rear is more squared off with minimal external features. No visible markings, camouflage patterns, or secondary weapon mounts are present, giving the vehicle a utilitarian and stealthy appearance.
description: A dark green, heavily armored combat vehicle with a central turret and long cannon, supported by six large road wheels per side and angular, reinforced body panels.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sharply sloped armor, central cannon barrel, and symmetrical track layout.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the six large road wheels, the length of the cannon, and the angular turret profile.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the squared-off back, turret base, and the continuation of the armored panels.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the road wheels, cannon, and angular body lines.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main cannon mounted centrally on the turret; no other weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular armor plating; sloped at the front and sides, with visible panel lines and reinforced sections.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid dark green color; no camouflage pattern visible.
